title.arabic: الدعاء إذا أراد الطعام أو الشراب

translations.en: To one who intends to give food or drink

text.arabic:
اللّهُـمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَن أَطْعَمَني،
وَاسْقِ مَن سقاني
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma aṭ`im man aṭ`amanī
wasqi man saqānī.

translations.en:
O Allah, feed the one who has fed me,
and give drink to the one who has given me drink.
